description: Quartr provides first-party investor-relations data from public companies, including earnings calls, transcripts, filings, reports, slide decks, and related metadata. Its products include a programmatic API for teams and an MCP server for AI-driven research workflows.
summary: Quartr exposes a REST-based Public API authenticated by `x-api-key`, plus a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.quartr.com/mcp` authenticated with Quartr account OAuth.
